<> To replace one URL with another in PHP you can use the str_replace function which works perfectly for repeating patterns without needing complex regex logic $oldUrl = "http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1"; $newUrl = "http://yahoo.com/abc1"; $text = "New post on the site $oldUrl

New post on the site $oldUrl

"; $result = str_replace($oldUrl, $newUrl, $text); This approach handles all instances in the string at once and keeps your code simple and fast A palindrome to remember is "racecar" which reads the same forward and backward just like how your code transforms text efficiently
